Doing this will reduce the risk of you having an unplanned power cut in the future as we appreciate your area has been impacted with unplanned power cuts in the last 6 months. IncidentCategoryCustomerFriendlyDescript: We are diverting sections of overhead electricity cables and replacing them with new underground electricity cables along with removing redundant equipment. Following a customers request, we are also installing a new Independent Distribution Network Operator (IDNO) substation to the electricity network. To complete the work safely we need to turn your power off. Doing this will give the third party their desired outcome as we have a duty to provide electricity when required, improve the reliability of the network and reduce the risk of you having an unplanned power cut in the future. This work is taking place in The Drive area.

Hi David here again. Great news - Our engineers have now restored power to all 1210 customers in the CM7 9 area. We had to turn off extra properties to be able to divert power around the faulty underground electrical equipment, this is why the number is larger then originally thought.

If your power isn't back on, we'll need to hear from you. To report this, or to talk to us about anything else, call us on 08003163105 which is free from landlines and mobiles.
